---
title: "Modeling Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

I have produced a data set containing ball by ball information for 1960 women's T20 internationals.

```{r Summary of our Data set}
summary(wt20)
```

Selecting some good variables for pairs:

```{r}
cts_data <- data.frame(wt20$date, wt20$win_by_runs, wt20$target, wt20$current_run_rate, wt20$required_run_rate)

pairs(cts_data)
```
